productDisplayName: Hush Puppies Men Slip on Black Casual Sandals
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these sandals from hush puppies are made for you. These fisherman style sandals are a great mix of classic styling and comfortable materials.Team these with jeans or chinos and tees for a cool look. Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Stitch detailing for added style Velcro flap closure through a metal loop on the ankle for a snug Fit Elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Textile lining for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all day comfort EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole TPR outsole with deep squared out grooves with multi-directional grooves for better grip Heel for ergonomic comfort Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
